scenarios.name: paginated-post-list
scenarios.rationale: Response A fully satisfies the rubric, while Response B uses cursor-based pagination, omits the required offset variable, and sets keyArgs incorrectly.

scenarios.name: optimistic-create-post
scenarios.rationale: Response B fully satisfies the rubric by using a POST_FRAGMENT and cache.modify, while Response A omits the fragment and uses update instead.
